request.brief: Schedule a 60-minute Sunday morning cooking block from The French Chef: Julia Child technique demos, warm humor, and family-friendly pacing.

response.channel_brief_interpretation: A 60-minute Sunday morning block from The French Chef — Julia Child demos, warm teaching humor, and family-friendly technique segments paced for relaxed co-viewing.

lineup.title: Side preparation
lineup.programming_rationale: Slot 1 of 7 sequences "Side preparation" from Ep 1 into the The French Chef with Julia Child FAST block. Julia Child, Guest Assistant drive the moment: Editorially, "Side preparation" is the pivot of Ep 1: Julia Child and Guest Assistant drive the collaborative → lighthearted arc.  Julia assigns the assistant a simple garnish while she tastes for salt. Placed here to sustain prime-time energy across the 60-minute lineup.

lineup.lead_out_note: Sets up "Plating" in Ep 2 by leaving Julia Child in unresolved tension.
